series_metadata.series_title: Real Estate Enforcement Cases resulting in Advisory Letters
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a real estate licensee or a person alleged to be engaged in unlicensed activity (ORC 4735.052) in which the Division closes the case with an advisory letter. This schedule consists of, but is not limited to, the complaint, letters notifying the Respondent and the Complainant an advisory letter is being issued, any proof of service, any items received during the course of the Division''s investigation and/or any investigative reports or attorney-client memorandums. Items and/or information received during the Division''s investigation and any investigative reports are confidential pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Section 4735.05(D) and any attorney-client memorandums are confidential attorney-client communication.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records maintained in paper form may maintained or in an off-site warehouse facility and shall be maintained a total of five years from date advisory letter was issued by Division. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained five years from date advisory letter was issued by Division. ; Microform: any records maintained in microfiche, records shall be maintained five years from date advisory letter was issued by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
